scripts.package: npm run build && web-ext build --source-dir . --artifacts-dir dist-xpi --ignore-files "src/**" "test/**" "tsconfig.json" "build.mjs" "node_modules/**" "dist-xpi/**" ".git/**" "*.txt" "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" "package.json" "package-lock.json"
scripts.dev: npm run build && web-ext run --source-dir . -t thunderbird
